chapter_title.ar: باب مَوْلِدِ الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ ( عليه السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 116 – Nazool (Arrival) of Al-Husayn Bin Ali<sup>asws</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مختلف فيه صحيح عندي - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5/362)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مختلف فيه صحيح عندي - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5/362)
text: كَانَ بَيْنَ الْحَسَنِ وَ الْحُسَيْنِ ( عليهما السلام ) طُهْرٌ وَ كَانَ بَيْنَهُمَا فِي الْمِيلَادِ سِتَّةُ أَشْهُرٍ وَ عَشْراً .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Abdul Rahman Al Arzamy,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘There was between Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> and Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup> a gap that of one cycle (six months and ten days), and the age gap between the two (Imams) was six months and ten (days)’.
en.sarwar: 1. Sa‘d and Ahmad ibn Muhammad together have narrated from Ibrahim ibn mahziyar from his brother, Ali ibn Mahziyar from al-Husayn ibn Sa‘id from Muhammad ibn Sinan from ibn Muskan from abu Basir from abu ‘Abdallah (a.s.) who has said the following. “Al-Husayn (a.s.) passed away on the day of ‘Ashura’ and he was fifty seven years old.”
